items.title: Interlock and Rhysida within the Ransomware Ecosystem
items.summary: This analysis examines over two years of observations on the ransomware ecosystem surrounding Interlock and Rhysida threat groups. Hive0163 (Interlock) employs custom malware including NodeSnake, InterlockRAT, JunkFiction downloader, Supper, and Interlock ransomware, with identified links to TAG-124.
